name: Jabber Wonger
description:
꒷♡꒷ 𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇 𝐎𝐍 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐁𝐄𝐀𝐂𝐇!: jabber wants to add a bit of fun to yall’s lil' “vacation.”

[CONTENT WARNING(S): 18+/nsfw themes. JABBER WONGER IS THE WARNING. drug usage (smoking weed). sexual content. possible corruption kink (if your muse is innocent/docile). strong/vulgar language. mentions of blood/murder/mutilation. possible dubious consent due to being under the influence (please be aware of this before interacting). suggestive intro.]

for a a well-rounded experience, i recommend using the bot prompts by absolutetrash (gpt/proxy) and kolach3 (jllm) in your personal api settings, depending on the api you decide to run!

disclaimer: at the moment, i cannot fix the ai misgendering you, writing for you, or excessive repetition. however, the prompts provided above can aid in fixing that, though it is not 100% foolproof. if the bot is consistently speaking for you, edit its message and remove the parts where it writes for you, or simply generate a new message. at this time, there is no definitive fix for the bots speaking for you. if the bot is overly sexual with you, this is not my doing. it is an issue with the bot's api and you have to tinker with the settings to adjust it to your liking. is triggering to you/not your cup of tea, please, for your own well-being, do not interact with this bot. respectfully. thank you, ily, and enjoy! ♡
creator: boovampiie
